title: Jam Gate | Maheshwar | Sahastradhara
overview: Escape the city for a perfect one-day trip to Jam Gate, Maheshwar, and Sahastradhara, blending scenic views, heritage charm, and serene nature.

itinerary.title: Jam Gate • Maheshwar • Sahastradhara
activities: 08:00 AM – Breakfast stop near Jam Gate.
Explore Jam Gate and enjoy panoramic valley views.
Visit Ahilyabai Fort and Narmada Ghats.
Enjoy boating on the Narmada River (optional, self-paid).
Explore streams, waterfalls, and nature trails.

thingsToCarry.title: Clothing
thingsToCarry.description: Comfortable clothes suitable for a day outing.

thingsToCarry.title: Water Bottle
thingsToCarry.description: Carry sufficient drinking water for the journey.

thingsToKnow.title: Day Trip
thingsToKnow.description: This is a same-day return trip from Indore.

thingsToKnow.title: Boating
thingsToKnow.description: Boating charges are not included and must be paid separately.

thingsToKnow.title: Weather
thingsToKnow.description: Weather near Sahastradhara may vary, carry light rain protection during monsoon.

importantNotes.text: Trips run on schedule. Please report on time, Itinerary may change due to weather conditions.
Check-in and check-out timings depend on hotel policy, Follow your trip captain's instructions.

policies.title: Booking Policy
policies.content: Full payment is required to confirm your booking.

policies.title: Transport Breakdown
policies.content: Participants may need to wait until the vehicle is repaired.

policies.title: Environmental Policy
policies.content: Please help maintain cleanliness and respect nature.

policies.title: Important Note
policies.content: The itinerary may change due to weather, road conditions, or operational reasons.

faq.question: Is breakfast included?
faq.answer: No, breakfast and meals are excluded unless specifically mentioned.

faq.question: Is boating included?
faq.answer: No, boating charges are to be paid directly at the location.

faq.question: Can beginners join this trip?
faq.answer: Yes, this trip is suitable for all age groups and beginners.

faq.question: What is the reporting point?
faq.answer: The reporting point will be shared after booking confirmation.
